title: AMD Places Bet On Open Optical Standards For Future AI Data Centers
summary: AMD (NasdaqGS:AMD) and partners including Broadcom, Meta, Microsoft, NVIDIA and OpenAI have formed the Optical Compute Interconnect (OCI) Multi-Source Agreement consortium. The group aims to define open standards for optical interconnects in AI data centers, with a focus on improvements in scalability, power efficiency and performance. The OCI MSA focuses on moving AI infrastructure away from traditional copper connectivity toward optical links that are suited for large AI models and...
